name: Special City Council Closed Session
summary:
• Special closed session meeting on June 11, 2026 at City Council Chambers, focused only on closed-session items and no other business.
  • Labor negotiations will be discussed with the Police Employees’ Association and Municipal Employees’ Association, with City Manager Dave Kiff as the designated negotiator.
  • Real property negotiations include one Laguna Beach site at 650C Laguna Canyon Road and four APN-listed parcels, all for price and terms of payment.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • Legal counsel will review potential litigation tied to a 2023 FIRE letter challenging the Forest Avenue Promenade speech restrictions as unconstitutional.
  • The meeting will adjourn to the next regular City Council meeting tentatively set for June 23, 2026 at 505 Forest Avenue.

name: Design Review Board
summary:
• Design Review Board meeting on June 11, 2026 focused on public participation, consent, and multiple development permits, with a primary staff recommendation to continue one item and consider several others for approval.
  • Most important: 2885 Rounsevel Terrace (APN: 656-165-12) seeks a variance for an existing ADU encroachment into the side setback; staff recommends continuing the hearing to July 23, 2026.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • 341 Holly Street (APN: 496-035-01) proposes an attached ADU and variance for a nonconforming residential structure; staff recommends approval, citing CEQA categorical exemptions.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • 954 Rembrandt Drive (APN: 644-232-42) involves modifications to an under-construction single-family home, including a new elevated deck and interior/exterior changes; staff recommends approval as a categorical CEQA exemption.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • 1375 Circle Way (APN: 053-131-09) proposes additions, remodels, a new elevator, landscaping, and site improvements to an existing home in the coastal zone; staff recommends approval with CEQA exemption findings.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • 31461 Coast Hwy (APN: 056-032-27) requests deck expansions on an existing home; the project references prior approval and an existing mitigated negative declaration.
seo_text: 1. CALL TO ORDER 2. PUBLIC COMMUNICATIONS - At this time, members of the public may address the Design Review Board regarding any items not on the agenda but within the subject matter jurisdiction of the Design Review Board. No action may be taken on off-agenda items unless authorized by law. Comments shall be limited to three (3) minutes each and fifteen (15) minutes for all comments, unless extended for good cause by the Design Review Board. 3. MODIFICATION OF AGENDA ORDER 4. CONSENT CALENDAR

name: Heritage Committee - CANCELED
summary:
• Meeting canceled: The June 15, 2025 Heritage Committee meeting will not take place.
  • Next meeting scheduled: The Heritage Committee’s next regular meeting is set for July 20, 2025 at 6:00 PM.
  • ADA accommodation notice is included, with instructions to contact the City Clerk at (949) 497-0302 or (949) 497-0771 at least 48 hours in advance.
seo_text: THIS JUNE 15, 2025, MEETING HAS BEEN CANCELED. THE NEXT REGULAR HERITAGE COMMITTEE MEETING IS SCHEDULED FOR JULY 20, 2025, AT 6:00 PM.
